enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadhale Kadhale from the movie 96 beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and nostalgia. It serves as a poignant reminder of the protagonist's past romance, evoking a sense of longing and melancholy. The lyrics and melody together create a soothing yet powerful experience, resonating deeply with anyone who has experienced love. This song is a perfect blend of heartfelt emotions and musical brilliance, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
